	- require(bool)(address(this).balance == 0) (Sale.sol#999)

	- mintToken1155(msg.sender,p.rewardsToken1155[i]) (Sale.sol#927)

	- transferNFT(msg.sender,p.rewardsNftFixed[p.rewardsNftFixed.length - 1]) (Sale.sol#935)
		- token1155.safeTransferFrom(address(this),purchaser,tokenId,1,) (Sale.sol#981)

	- p.rewardsNftFixed.length -- (Sale.sol#937)

	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup

	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents

	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor
